code: export class WantedListParser{constructor(){this._data=[];}flush(){this._data=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){this._data.push({userId:wrapper.readInt(),username:wrapper.readString(),figure:wrapper.readString(),wantedLevel:wrapper.readInt(),charges:wrapper.readString()});}return true;}getWantedUsers(){return this._data;}}
